query:
-- Active Living: "Other" → "4G Data Backup Service" — customer billed $39 inc GST ($35.45 ex GST)
-- The $49 was a placeholder. The revenue is $20.00 which is what's matched from the Xero billing item.
-- The SasBoss invoice shows the customer pays $39 inc GST for 4G Data Backup.
-- Access4 wholesale for 4G SIM backup is typically $15-20/month. Revenue is $20 ex GST ($22 inc GST).
-- Update planName and keep cost review flag; set cost to $18.18 (typical Access4 4G SIM wholesale ex GST)
UPDATE services 
SET planName = '4G Data Backup Service',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED | Invoice 890163: Customer billed $39 inc GST. Access4 wholesale cost unknown - estimated $18.18 ex GST.')
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0003' AND planName = 'Other' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- Bracken Ridge Family Practice: "Other" → "4G Failover" — customer billed $35 inc GST ($31.82 ex GST)
-- SIM 8200093721783. Revenue $35.00 (ex GST). This means the customer is billed $35 ex GST.
-- The invoice shows $35.00 is the TOTAL (subtotal $35, GST $3.50, total $38.50) — so $35 IS ex GST.
-- Access4 wholesale for 4G SIM: ~$15-20/month
UPDATE services 
SET planName = '4G Failover SIM',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED | Invoice 890190: Customer billed $35 ex GST (SIM 8200093721783). Access4 wholesale cost unknown - estimated.')
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0044' AND planName = 'Other' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- Fast Cut Qld: "4G Data Backup Service" already correct name — customer billed $30 inc GST ($27.27 ex GST)
-- Revenue $30.00 (inc GST) — but monthlyRevenue shows $30.00 which suggests it's already ex GST in DB
UPDATE services 
SET planName = '4G Data Backup Service',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED | Invoice 890124: Customer billed $30 inc GST ($27.27 ex GST). Access4 wholesale cost unknown.')
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0091' AND planName = '4G Data Backup Service' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- Swara: "Other" → "Managed Voice Support" — customer billed $25 inc GST ($22.73 ex GST)
-- Revenue $25.00. This is a managed voice support service - likely an Access4 add-on
UPDATE services 
SET planName = 'Managed Voice Support',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED | Invoice 890155: Customer billed $25 inc GST ($22.73 ex GST). Access4 wholesale cost unknown.')
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0235' AND planName = 'Other' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- True Metal Solutions: "Other" → "4G SIM Backup Internet Service" — customer billed $35 inc GST ($31.82 ex GST)
UPDATE services 
SET planName = '4G SIM Backup Internet Service',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED | Invoice 890134: Customer billed $35 inc GST ($31.82 ex GST). Access4 wholesale cost unknown.')
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0271' AND planName = 'Other' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- Nicki's Professional Security Screens: "Other" → "4G Data Backup Service" — customer billed $39 inc GST ($35.45 ex GST)
-- Revenue $39.00 in DB. Invoice 890163 shows $39 inc GST for 4G Data Backup Service
UPDATE services 
SET planName = '4G Data Backup Service',
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | COST REVIEW NEEDED | Invoice 890163: Customer billed $39 inc GST ($35.45 ex GST). Access4 wholesale cost unknown.')
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C2893' AND planName = 'Other' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;
